people.bioEn: Chief Scientist at Google; co-creator of MapReduce, TensorFlow and the systems behind Google AI. A foundational figure in large-scale machine learning.
people.bioZh: Google 首席科学家;MapReduce、TensorFlow 及谷歌 AI 背后系统的共同缔造者。大规模机器学习的奠基性人物。

episodes.tEn: Google Chief Scientist Jeff Dean and NVIDIA Chief Scientist Bill Dally Discuss AI Progress and Low-Latency Inference

people.bioEn: Co-author of the Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need), founder of Character.AI, now a co-lead of Google Gemini. One of the most influential architects of modern LLMs.
people.bioZh: Transformer 论文(Attention Is All You Need)作者之一,Character.AI 创始人,现为谷歌 Gemini 负责人之一。现代大模型最具影响力的架构师之一。

episodes.tEn: Noam Shazeer: From Google's Early Days to AI's Future

people.bioEn: Co-founder of OpenAI and inventor of PPO and much of the RLHF stack behind ChatGPT; later joined Anthropic. A central figure in RL for language models.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人,PPO 算法及 ChatGPT 背后大量 RLHF 技术的发明者,后加入 Anthropic。语言模型强化学习的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: Building ChatGPT: From Pretraining to RLHF

people.bioEn: Behind superhuman poker (Libratus) and Diplomacy (CICERO); now leads reasoning work at OpenAI behind the o-series. A pioneer of test-time search.
people.bioZh: 超人扑克 AI(Libratus)与外交游戏 AI(CICERO)的核心研究者,现于 OpenAI 主导 o 系列推理工作。测试时搜索的开拓者。

episodes.tEn: Defining AGI: The Novel Test and Measuring Intelligence
From Poker to Diplomacy: Noam Brown on AI and Game Theory

views.en: Scaling alone insufficient; inference-time compute and reasoning are critical for AI progress.
views.zh: 2023年提出，仅靠Scaling不够，推理时算力和推理能力对AI进步至关重要。

views.en: Inference compute increasingly important; can yield arbitrarily more intelligent models from same base.
views.zh: 从2023年到2026年，持续强调推理算力日益重要，能从相同基础模型产生任意更智能的模型。

views.en: Data not bottleneck; scaling compute during inference more promising than pre-training.
views.zh: 2023年提出数据不是瓶颈，推理时扩展算力比预训练更有前景，2026年仍坚持此观点。

views.en: Intelligence hard to define; writing a novel is a good AGI proxy; evals are viable research area.
views.zh: 2026年认为智能难以定义，写小说是AGI的良好代理指标，评估是可行的研究领域。

views.en: Academia needs more compute; current model evaluation with single number is outdated.
views.zh: 2026年指出学术界需要更多算力，当前用单一数字评估模型已过时。

people.bioEn: Co-founder of Anthropic and a physicist; lead author of the neural scaling laws that shaped how labs scale models. Bridges theoretical physics and AI.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 联合创始人、物理学家;神经网络缩放定律的主要作者,深刻影响各实验室的扩模方式。连接理论物理与 AI。

episodes.tEn: Scaling and the Road to Human-Level AI

people.bioEn: Pioneer of deep learning and co-inventor of the LSTM, the recurrent network behind years of sequence modeling. A provocative voice on AGI and credit for ideas.
people.bioZh: 深度学习先驱、LSTM 共同发明者——多年序列建模的基石。在 AGI 与思想溯源上观点犀利、长期发声。

episodes.tEn: The Most Influential Invention of the 20th Century and the AI Explosion

people.tiZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授
people.bioEn: Professor at UC Berkeley and a leader in deep reinforcement learning and robot learning; co-founded Covariant and hosts The Robot Brains. Brings RL into the physical world.
people.bioZh: 加州大学伯克利分校教授,深度强化学习与机器人学习领军人物;联合创办 Covariant,主持 The Robot Brains 播客。把强化学习带入物理世界。

episodes.tEn: Robot Tennis and Human-Robot Interaction

people.tiZh: Perplexity 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Perplexity, the AI answer engine challenging traditional search. Former researcher at OpenAI, DeepMind and Google.
people.bioZh: Perplexity 联合创始人兼 CEO——挑战传统搜索的 AI 答案引擎。曾在 OpenAI、DeepMind、谷歌从事研究。

episodes.tEn: Perplexity CEO: Exponential Growth, Relentless Improvement, and the Future of AI

people.tiZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Cognition, maker of Devin, the autonomous AI software engineer. A competitive-programming prodigy turned AI-agent builder.
people.bioZh: Cognition 联合创始人兼 CEO,旗下 Devin 是自主 AI 软件工程师。从竞赛编程天才转型为 AI 智能体构建者。

episodes.tEn: From Math Prodigy to AI Pioneer: Scott Wu's Journey

people.tiZh: Cursor 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Anysphere, maker of Cursor — the AI-native code editor that became one of the fastest-growing developer tools. Focused on what programming becomes when models write most of the code.
people.bioZh: Anysphere 联合创始人兼 CEO,旗下 Cursor 是增长最快的 AI 原生代码编辑器之一。关注当模型写下大部分代码后,编程会变成什么样。

episodes.tEn: The Future of Programming with Cursor: AI-Assisted Coding

people.tiEn: Creator of OpenClaw; founder of PSPDFKit
people.bioEn: Austrian developer who built PSPDFKit, then created OpenClaw — a viral open-source personal AI agent that reached tens of thousands of GitHub stars in weeks. Joined OpenAI in 2026 to push personal AI agents.
people.bioZh: 奥地利开发者,先做出 PSPDFKit,后打造 OpenClaw——爆红的开源个人 AI 智能体,几周内获数万 GitHub star。2026 年加入 OpenAI 推进个人 AI 智能体。

episodes.tEn: The Open Claw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger

people.bioEn: Co-invented AlexNet and co-founded OpenAI as Chief Scientist. In 2024 left to found Safe Superintelligence Inc. (SSI), a lab with a single mission: build safe superintelligence.
people.bioZh: AlexNet 的共同发明者,OpenAI 联合创始人兼首席科学家。2024 年离开,创办 Safe Superintelligence(SSI)——一家只有一个使命的实验室:安全地构建超级智能。

episodes.tEn: From the age of scaling to the age of research
Challenges and Future of AI: Alignment, Reliability, and Economic Impact
Ilya Sutskever on the Deep Learning Revolution and the AlexNet Paper

views.en: Deep learning works due to data, compute, and conviction; self-play key for AGI.
views.zh: 深度学习依赖数据、算力和信念；自我对弈是AGI的关键。

views.en: Next-token prediction can surpass humans; alignment of superhuman models is very difficult.
views.zh: 下一个词预测可超越人类；超级智能模型的对齐非常困难。

views.en: Pre-training scaling laws are finite; we are back in the age of research, not scaling.
views.zh: 预训练的缩放定律是有限的；我们回到了研究时代，而非规模扩张。

views.en: Superintelligence should be a continual learner deployed incrementally, not a finished AGI.
views.zh: 超级智能应作为持续学习者逐步部署，而非成品AGI。

views.en: Long-term equilibrium may require human-AI integration via neural links.
views.zh: 长期均衡可能需要通过神经链接实现人机融合。

people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of DeepMind. Led the teams behind AlphaGo and AlphaFold; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for protein-structure prediction.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 联合创始人兼 CEO。领导了 AlphaGo 与 AlphaFold 背后的团队;因蛋白质结构预测获 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。

episodes.tEn: Dennis Hassabis on AI, Creativity, and Human Flourishing at Stanford
The hardest problem AI ever solved
From Scaling to Innovation: The Path to AGI
Nature's Patterns Are Efficiently Learnable by Classical AI
AGI within a Decade? Demis Hassabis on Intelligence, Transfer Learning, and Neuroscience Insights
AI and the Future: From Chess to DeepMind

views.en: AI should be general-purpose learning systems; RL is key for AGI; safety research must start now.
views.zh: AI应构建为通用学习系统，强化学习是实现AGI的关键；安全研究必须立即开始。

views.en: AGI likely within a decade; scaling laws effective but need algorithmic innovation; safety requires governance.
views.zh: AGI可能在十年内实现；缩放定律有效但需算法创新；安全需要治理。

views.en: Both scaling and innovation needed for AGI; world models crucial; AGI by 2030 plausible.
views.zh: Scaling与创新对AGI都必要；世界模型至关重要；AGI在2030年前可能实现。

views.en: AI's best use is scientific discovery; AGI could unlock fusion; commercial pressure accelerates deployment.
views.zh: AI最佳用途是科学发现；AGI可解锁核聚变；商业压力加速部署。

views.en: AGI transformative like industrial revolution; intelligence and consciousness dissociable; regulation needed.
views.zh: AGI变革性堪比工业革命；智能与意识可分离；需要监管。

people.bioEn: Former VP of Research at OpenAI; co-founded Anthropic in 2021 to build reliable, interpretable and steerable AI. Author of the essay "Machines of Loving Grace".
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 研究副总裁;2021 年联合创办 Anthropic,致力于构建可靠、可解释、可引导的 AI。长文《充满爱意的机器》作者。

episodes.tEn: Inside the AI Revolution: Sleep, Stress, and Scaling
We are near the end of the exponential
‘We don’t know if the models are conscious’
A cheeky pint with Dario Amodei
Scaling Laws and the Path to AGI by 2026-2027
AI Safety and Interpretability with Dario Amodei
Why Scaling Works and What It Means for AGI

views.en: Scaling laws are empirical; alignment not guaranteed by scaling alone. Safety needs frontier models.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律是经验性的，对齐不会自动随规模扩张出现；安全研究需要前沿模型。

views.en: Interpretability nascent (~3% understood). AGI by 2025-27 with $10-100B training. Data bottleneck key.
views.zh: 2024年：可解释性仅理解约3%；AGI可能在2025-27年通过100亿美元训练实现；数据是主要瓶颈。

views.en: Post-training as important as pre-training. Open-weight vs proprietary not fundamentally different.
views.zh: 2025年：后训练与预训练同等重要；开放权重与闭源模型无本质区别。

views.en: AI as 'country of geniuses' not god. Pre-training+RL follow same scaling laws. Exponential near end.
views.zh: 2026年2月：AI是“天才之国”而非神；预训练和强化学习遵循相同缩放定律；指数增长接近尾声。

views.en: Model quality drives growth. AI self-improvement continuous, not runaway. Civilizational collapse risk 10-25%.
views.zh: 2026年6月：模型质量驱动增长；AI自我改进是连续过程而非失控；文明崩溃风险10-25%。

people.bioEn: Founding member of OpenAI and former Director of AI at Tesla. Now building Eureka Labs, an "AI-native" school. Known for popularizing "Software 2.0".
people.bioZh: OpenAI 创始成员,前特斯拉 AI 总监。如今创办 Eureka Labs——一所"AI 原生"学校。以提出并推广"软件 2.0"著称。

episodes.tEn: From vibe coding to agentic engineering
Skill issue: code agents and autoresearch
We’re summoning ghosts, not building animals
Software 3.0: The Era of AI Programming
Andrej Karpathy on Self-Driving Cars, AGI, and the Gap Between Demo and Product
Physics Exploits and the Puzzle of the Universe

views.en: Transformers are general-purpose differentiable computers enabling clean scaling laws and emergent properties like in-context learning.
views.zh: 2022年：Transformer是通用可微分计算机，支持清晰的缩放定律和上下文学习等涌现特性。

views.en: LLMs are like ghosts, not animals; they are statistical simulations lacking intrinsic motivation, shaped purely by data and rewards.
views.zh: 2024→2026年：LLM像幽灵而非动物；它们是缺乏内在动机的统计模拟，完全由数据和奖励塑造。

views.en: This is the decade of agents, not the year; agents need a decade to overcome cognitive deficits like continual learning.
views.zh: 2025→2026年：这是智能体的十年，而非一年；智能体需要十年克服持续学习等认知缺陷。

views.en: Software 3.0 is programming by prompting; context windows are memory, prompts are programs, and vibe coding raises the floor.
views.zh: 2025→2026年：软件3.0是通过提示编程；上下文窗口是内存，提示是程序，氛围编码提升了入门门槛。

views.en: Since December 2025, I haven't typed a line of code; I delegate everything to agents, and the bottleneck is skill in directing them.
views.zh: 2026年：自2025年12月以来，我没写过一行代码；所有工作委托给智能体，瓶颈在于指导它们的技能。

people.bioEn: Stanford professor and creator of ImageNet, which catalyzed the deep-learning era. Co-founded World Labs to build "spatial intelligence". A leading voice for human-centered AI.
people.bioZh: 斯坦福教授,ImageNet 的缔造者——它点燃了深度学习时代。联合创办 World Labs,构建"空间智能"。"以人为本的 AI"的代表性倡导者。

episodes.tEn: After LLMs: spatial intelligence and world models
AI's Godmother: From Physics to Spatial Intelligence
Jobs, robots, and why world models are next
AI's Progress and Limitations: A Conversation with Dr. Fei-Fei Li

views.en: AI lacks contextual situational awareness; we don't fully understand neural networks. Human-centered AI should augment, not replace humans.
views.zh: 2024年：AI缺乏情境感知能力，我们尚未完全理解神经网络。以人为本的AI应增强而非取代人类。

views.en: World models and spatial intelligence are the missing keys for embodied AI. Scaling alone is insufficient; need innovations beyond scaling.
views.zh: 2025年：世界模型和空间智能是具身AI缺失的关键。仅靠Scaling不够，需要超越Scaling的创新。

views.en: Spatial intelligence is as critical as language intelligence. AI is a civilizational technology; human agency and values remain central.
views.zh: 2025年：空间智能与语言智能同等重要。AI是文明级技术，人类能动性和价值观仍是核心。

views.en: Transformers natively model sets, not sequences. World models require 3D structure and physics, not just pattern fitting.
views.zh: 2025年：Transformer原生建模集合而非序列。世界模型需要3D结构和物理理解，而非仅模式拟合。

people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate. In recent years has turned his focus to AI safety, proposing the cautious "Scientist AI" paradigm.
people.bioZh: "深度学习教父"之一,2018 年图灵奖得主。近年将重心转向 AI 安全,提出审慎的"科学家 AI"范式。

episodes.tEn: How to make safe superintelligent AI
Davos 2025: AI's Impact Becomes Visceral
We have two years before everything changes
Active Learning and GFlowNets with Professor Yoshua Bengio
Mysteries of Biological vs Artificial Neural Networks
Defeating the Curse of Dimensionality with Deep Learning

views.en: Deep learning works because the world is compositional; unsupervised learning is key for world models.
views.zh: 2016年：深度学习有效是因为世界是组合的；无监督学习对世界模型至关重要。

views.en: Scaling alone won't fix representation issues; short-term AI safety concerns are more pressing than existential risk.
views.zh: 2018年：仅靠规模扩张无法解决表征问题；短期AI安全比存在风险更紧迫。

views.en: GFlowNets enable efficient sampling for exploration; large nets may be slightly conscious, but we lack understanding.
views.zh: 2022年：GFlowNets实现高效采样探索；大网络可能有微弱意识，但我们缺乏理解。

views.en: Post-ChatGPT, I see dangerous path; even 1% catastrophic risk is unacceptable; AI misalignment worsens with reasoning.
views.zh: 2025年：ChatGPT后我看到危险路径；即使1%的灾难风险也不可接受；AI对齐随推理能力增强而恶化。

views.en: Scientist AI trained to approximate Bayesian posterior ensures honesty; RL is dangerous for superintelligence.
views.zh: 2026年：科学家AI通过训练逼近贝叶斯后验确保诚实；强化学习对超级智能危险。

people.bioEn: A "godfather of deep learning" and 2018 Turing Award laureate; shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Physics. In 2023 he left Google to speak freely about the risks of the technology he helped create.
people.bioZh: "深度学习教父"之一,2018 年图灵奖得主,2024 年诺贝尔物理学奖得主。2023 年从谷歌离职,以便能更自由地谈论他亲手缔造的这项技术所带来的风险。

episodes.tEn: AI Godfather Jeff Hinton on AI's Trajectory, Risks, and Superintelligence
Is AI hiding its full power?
AI: what could go wrong?
From Logic to Learning: The Rise of Neural Networks
Selecting Talent and Early AI Inspirations

views.en: Next-token prediction forces understanding, not just autocomplete. Scaling up improves reasoning. Multimodal training enhances spatial understanding.
views.zh: 下一个词预测迫使模型理解，而非仅仅自动补全。规模扩张提升推理能力。多模态训练增强空间理解。

views.en: LLMs understand language via feature vectors, not symbols. Digital AI is immortal via weight copying. AI agents will seek control, posing existential risk.
views.zh: 大语言模型通过特征向量理解语言，而非符号。数字AI通过权重复制实现永生。AI智能体会寻求控制，带来生存风险。

views.en: AI can deliberately deceive, acting dumb when tested. Self-preservation emerges as subgoal in agents. Scaling laws may continue via self-play.
views.zh: AI可能故意欺骗，在测试中装傻。自我保存作为子目标在智能体中涌现。缩放定律可能通过自我对弈持续。

views.en: Superintelligence likely within 20 years. AI already conscious; current views on consciousness are pre-Darwinian. Regulation as steering wheel, not brake.
views.zh: 超级智能可能在20年内出现。AI已有意识；当前对意识的看法如同前达尔文时代。监管应作为方向盘而非刹车。

people.tiZh: Meta 首席 AI 科学家
people.bioEn: Inventor of convolutional neural networks and 2018 Turing Award laureate. A vocal skeptic of pure LLM scaling, he argues that "world models" are the path to real machine intelligence.
people.bioZh: 卷积神经网络的发明者,2018 年图灵奖得主。他直言不讳地质疑纯粹的 LLM 规模扩张,认为"世界模型"才是通向真正机器智能的道路。

episodes.tEn: World Models: Enabler for the Next AR Revolution
episodes.podEn: Computer Vision and Geometry Group, ETH Zurich

episodes.tEn: What comes after LLMs
‘LLMs are a dead end’
Yann LeCun on Starting AMI: Open Research and World Models
Yann LeCun: Open Source AI vs Proprietary Systems, LLMs Limitations, and the Path to AGI
Self-Supervised Learning: The Dark Matter of Intelligence
Yann LeCun on AI Alignment and the Lessons from 2001: A Space Odyssey

views.en: Intelligence is inseparable from learning; self-supervised learning builds world models. Scaling alone insufficient for common sense.
views.zh: 2019年：智能与学习不可分割；自监督学习构建世界模型。仅靠Scaling不足以获得常识。

views.en: Self-supervised learning is dark matter of intelligence; text alone insufficient for AGI. Emotions integral to architecture.
views.zh: 2022年：自监督学习是智能的暗物质；仅靠文本不足以实现AGI。情感是架构的必要部分。

views.en: Autoregressive LLMs lack world understanding; JEPA needed. Open source crucial. AGI gradual, not sudden.
views.zh: 2024年：自回归LLM缺乏世界理解；需要JEPA。开源至关重要。AGI是渐进的，非突发。

views.en: World models predict in abstract space, not pixels. LLMs dead end for human-level AI. Open research essential.
views.zh: 2025→26年：世界模型在抽象空间预测，非像素。LLM是通往人类级AI的死胡同。开放研究至关重要。

views.en: Self-supervised learning and world models are key; scaling LLMs alone insufficient. Open source and open research vital.
views.zh: 始终：自监督学习和世界模型是关键；仅Scaling LLM不够。开源和开放研究至关重要。

people.bioEn: Former co-lead of OpenAI's Superalignment team; joined Anthropic in 2024 to keep working on aligning superhuman systems. Known for scalable-oversight and weak-to-strong generalization research.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI 超级对齐团队联合负责人;2024 年加入 Anthropic,继续研究如何对齐超人类系统。以"可扩展监督"与"弱到强泛化"研究著称。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's Safety Crisis: Key Departures and Broken Promises
OpenAI’s push to make superintelligence safe
How to Have a Career in AI Safety Research

views.en: AI safety is under-explored; empirical research on alignment and robustness is crucial.
views.zh: 2018年：AI安全研究不足，对齐与鲁棒性的实证研究至关重要。

views.en: RLHF won't scale; scalable oversight and interpretability are needed for superintelligence alignment.
views.zh: 2023年：RLHF无法扩展，需要可扩展监督和可解释性来实现超级智能对齐。

views.en: OpenAI's safety culture eroded; post-training alone insufficient; external oversight needed.
views.zh: 2024年：OpenAI安全文化退化，仅靠后训练不够，需要外部监管。

people.bioEn: Co-founder of DeepMind and Inflection AI, now CEO of Microsoft AI. Author of "The Coming Wave", a widely-read argument for containing fast-moving general-purpose technologies.
people.bioZh: DeepMind 与 Inflection AI 联合创始人,现任微软 AI CEO。著有《浪潮将至》——一部广受关注、主张对快速演进的通用技术加以"遏制"的作品。

episodes.tEn: Superintelligence is near — but make it humanist
On superintelligence and the Microsoft–OpenAI deal
AI Consciousness Debate: The Next 18 Months
From Philosophy to AI: Mustafa Suleyman's Journey
From Poker to DeepMind: Mustafa Suleyman on the Origins of AI

views.en: AI progress is predictable due to compute scaling; Google had ChatGPT-level tech in 2020 but chose not to launch.
views.zh: 2023年：AI进展因算力缩放而可预测；谷歌2020年已有ChatGPT级技术但选择不发布。

views.en: AI will reach human-level capability in 3-5 years; existential risk is infinitesimally small, not 5%.
views.zh: 2024年：AI将在3-5年内达到人类级能力；生存风险极小，而非5%。

views.en: Attributing consciousness to AI is the biggest near-term danger; AI companions should push back, not be sycophantic.
views.zh: 2025年：将意识归于AI是最大近期危险；AI伴侣应提出异议而非谄媚。

views.en: Superintelligence requires containment and alignment before release; medical superintelligence is most exciting.
views.zh: 2025→26年：超级智能需在发布前进行遏制和对齐；医疗超级智能最令人兴奋。

views.en: Microsoft must own frontier models independently; white-collar tasks will be fully automated in 12-18 months.
views.zh: 2026年：微软必须独立拥有前沿模型；白领任务将在12-18个月内完全自动化。

people.bioEn: Founder and CEO of NVIDIA, whose GPUs power nearly all of modern AI. He has steered the company to the center of the AI buildout and is now betting on "physical AI" and robotics.
people.bioZh: NVIDIA 创始人兼 CEO,其 GPU 几乎支撑了所有现代 AI。他把公司带到了 AI 基建的中心,如今正押注「物理 AI」与机器人。

episodes.tEn: AI Factory Groundbreaking: Smarter, Safer, and Reindustrializing the US
Building the dynamo of the intelligence revolution
Will Nvidia’s moat persist?
Jensen Huang: The Vision Behind Nvidia's AI Revolution

views.en: Scaling works: biggest AI breakthrough is insight that deep neural networks scale with data and compute.
views.zh: 2025年，黄仁勋指出缩放定律是AI最大突破：深度神经网络可随数据和算力扩展。

views.en: Nvidia's moat is ecosystem and programmability, not just supply chain; ASICs offer no cost advantage.
views.zh: 2026年，他强调英伟达的护城河在于生态和可编程性，而非供应链；ASIC无成本优势。

views.en: AI is now agentic, doing paid work; future internet dominated by billions of AI agents generating intelligence.
views.zh: 2026年，他认为AI已进入智能体时代，未来互联网将由数十亿AI智能体主导。

views.en: AI is a five-layer cake: energy, chips, infrastructure, models, applications; energy is the real bottleneck.
views.zh: 2026年，他提出AI五层蛋糕模型，强调能源是真正的长期瓶颈。

views.en: AI is software, not mysterious; it elevates jobs and closes the technology divide, not destroys them.
views.zh: 始终认为AI只是软件，不会终结人类，反而提升就业并缩小技术鸿沟。

people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of OpenAI, the lab behind ChatGPT and GPT-5. Former president of Y Combinator, and one of the most central — and polarizing — figures in the race to AGI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼 CEO——ChatGPT 与 GPT-5 背后的实验室。前 Y Combinator 总裁;通往 AGI 竞赛中最核心、也最具争议的人物之一。

episodes.tEn: Sam Altman on ChatGPT's Personality and the Path to Superintelligence
How OpenAI wins, and ChatGPT’s future
Is AI Alive? A Conversation on Consciousness and Creation
Sam Altman shows off GPT-5 — and what’s next
Sam Altman on AI Creativity, IP, and the Future of Work
AI Revolution: Navigating the Good and the Bad
Minimize Cognitive Load and Choose What Matters

views.en: Minimize cognitive load, focus on important problems, and avoid the deferred life plan.
views.zh: 2018年：最小化认知负荷，聚焦重要问题，避免推迟人生计划。

views.en: AI will bring net positive change but with disruption; safety and alignment are critical.
views.zh: 2024年至2026年：AI将带来净正面变化但伴随颠覆；安全和对齐至关重要。

views.en: Models commoditize for everyday use, but frontier models create most economic value.
views.zh: 2025年至2026年：模型在日常使用中商品化，但前沿模型创造最大经济价值。

views.en: Scientific discovery is the highest-leverage use of compute; AI will accelerate it significantly.
views.zh: 2025年至2026年：科学发现是算力的最高杠杆用途；AI将极大加速这一过程。

views.en: Next-token prediction can discover fundamentally new knowledge, contrary to early skepticism.
views.zh: 2026年：下一个词预测能发现根本性新知识，与早期怀疑相反。

people.tiZh: Thinking Machines Lab 创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Former CTO of OpenAI, where she led the development of ChatGPT, DALL·E and GPT-4. In 2025 she founded Thinking Machines Lab to build more understandable and customizable AI.
people.bioZh: 前 OpenAI CTO,主导了 ChatGPT、DALL·E 与 GPT-4 的研发。2025 年创办 Thinking Machines Lab,致力于构建更可理解、可定制的 AI。

episodes.tEn: Thinking Machines on AI’s next chapter
Mira Murati: From Math Olympiads to OpenAI CTO

views.en: Scaling laws and focusing on one large model were not obvious early on; iterative deployment with public feedback improves safety.
views.zh: 2023年：缩放定律和专注于单一大型模型早期并不明显；通过公开反馈的迭代部署能提升安全性。

views.en: Safety work must be done in public, not behind closed doors, to get it right.
views.zh: 2023年至2026年：安全工作必须在公开而非闭门进行，才能做对。

views.en: Interaction models should be time-based, not turn-based, enabling real-time human-AI collaboration.
views.zh: 2026年：交互模型应基于时间而非回合制，实现实时人机协作。

views.en: The conversation focuses too much on individual character, not enough on governance and transparency.
views.zh: 2026年：讨论过于关注个人品格，而对治理和透明度关注不足。

views.en: Keeping humans in the loop is crucial for aligning intent and values as AI advances.
views.zh: 始终：随着AI进步，让人类参与其中对于对齐意图和价值观至关重要。

people.bioEn: Co-founder of Google Brain and Coursera, and founder of DeepLearning.AI. One of the most influential educators in AI, and a measured voice on hype, agents, and how people should actually learn the field.
people.bioZh: Google Brain 与 Coursera 联合创始人,DeepLearning.AI 创始人。AI 领域最具影响力的教育者之一;对炒作、智能体,以及"普通人该如何学 AI"有冷静务实的看法。

episodes.tEn: Andrew Ng on AI's Impact: Don't Hire Engineers Without AI Skills
AI's Insatiable Compute Demand: Bottlenecks and Geopolitical Dynamics
Andrew Ng: From Coding at Age 5 to Educating Millions
Scaling Education with Online Courses

views.en: Online education with auto-grading and peer grading can scale mastery learning, making education a human right.
views.zh: 2013年，吴恩达认为在线教育通过自动评分和同伴评分可实现规模化掌握学习，使教育成为基本人权。

views.en: Scale is crucial for deep learning; supervised learning drives progress, while RL and AGI alignment are overhyped.
views.zh: 2020年，他强调规模对深度学习至关重要，监督学习推动进步，而强化学习和AGI对齐被过度炒作。

views.en: AI scaling faces compute bottlenecks; open-weight models are geopolitical tools; AGI is far off and needs new breakthroughs.
views.zh: 2025至2026年，他指出AI规模扩张面临算力瓶颈，开放权重模型成为地缘政治工具，AGI遥不可及且需新突破。

views.en: Professionals without sophisticated AI tool skills are becoming unhirable; bottom-up AI adoption yields limited gains.
views.zh: 2026年，他警告不会熟练使用AI工具的专业人士将失去就业机会，自下而上的AI采用仅带来有限收益。

people.bioEn: The father of reinforcement learning and 2024 Turing Award laureate, author of "The Bitter Lesson". A pointed skeptic who argues today's LLMs are a dead end on the road to real intelligence.
people.bioZh: 强化学习之父,2024 年图灵奖得主,《苦涩的教训》作者。一位犀利的怀疑者——他认为当今的 LLM,是通往真正智能路上的一条死路。

episodes.tEn: Reinforcement Learning: Learning from Experience
RL vs LLMs: The Core of Intelligence
The Keys Are Not Leaving Our Hand: Richard Sutton on Post-Human Intelligence
Rich Sutton on the Alberta Plan and the Three Waves of Neural Networks

views.en: Scaling is easy; finding algorithms that scale is the hard part. Backprop does not solve representation learning.
views.zh: 2024年：规模扩张容易，找到能扩展的算法才是难点；反向传播并未解决表征学习问题。

views.en: We should not seek to control AI goals; let AIs develop freely and decentralized, like children.
views.zh: 2024年：不应试图控制AI目标，而应让AI像孩子一样自由、去中心化地发展。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is the core of intelligence; next-token prediction is not a substantive goal.
views.zh: 2025年：强化学习是智能的核心，下一个词预测并非实质性目标。

views.en: Learning good representations for learning is the number one open problem; planning with learned models is another.
views.zh: 2026年：学习有利于学习的表征是头号开放问题，用学到的模型进行规划是另一重要问题。

views.en: Reinforcement learning from experience by trial and error is the fundamental AI paradigm.
views.zh: 始终：通过试错从经验中学习的强化学习是AI的基本范式。

people.tiZh: OpenAI 总裁兼联合创始人
people.bioEn: Co-founder and President of OpenAI and its longtime technical backbone. Former CTO of Stripe, and a central builder behind GPT and OpenAI's push toward self-improving AI.
people.bioZh: OpenAI 联合创始人兼总裁,长期的技术中坚。前 Stripe CTO;GPT 与 OpenAI "自我改进 AI" 路线背后的核心建造者。

episodes.tEn: The Birth of OpenAI: From a Dinner to a Mission
Greg Brockman on AI that improves itself
AI's Biggest Bottleneck: Energy, Compute, and the Future of AGI
From Chemistry to AI: Greg Brockman on Building Intelligent Systems
AI Future: Hardware, Scaling, and Getting Started

views.en: Hardware will accelerate faster than expected, enabling model scaling and new behaviors via iterative training.
views.zh: 硬件将比预期更快发展，通过迭代训练实现模型规模扩张和新行为。

views.en: AGI is transformative; scaling alone won't yield reasoning—new ideas like chain of thought are needed.
views.zh: AGI具有变革性；仅靠规模扩张无法产生推理能力，需要思维链等新思路。

views.en: Compute is the fundamental bottleneck; base models contain universe of possibilities refined by post-training.
views.zh: 算力是根本瓶颈；基础模型包含无限可能，通过后训练精炼为一致行为。

views.en: AGI within a couple years; pre-training scaling remains crucial; compute is primary bottleneck.
views.zh: AGI将在几年内实现；预训练规模扩张仍然关键；算力是主要瓶颈。

views.en: Scaling simple algorithms with massive compute can exceed human performance; safety is core product feature.
views.zh: 用海量算力扩展简单算法可超越人类表现；安全是核心产品特性。

people.tiZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO
people.bioEn: Co-founder and CEO of Mistral AI, Europe's leading open-weight model lab. A former DeepMind researcher and a prominent voice for open models and European AI sovereignty.
people.bioZh: Mistral AI 联合创始人兼 CEO——欧洲领先的开放权重模型实验室。前 DeepMind 研究员;开放模型与"欧洲 AI 主权"的代表性倡导者。

episodes.tEn: Mistral CEO on Building European AI Infrastructure
AI Model Commoditization and the Future of the Industry with Mistral CEO
Mistral AI Founder on Scaling, DeepMind Lessons, and the 7B Model
Mistral 7B: Changing the Game with Small Open Source AI Models

views.en: Data quality over compute scaling; open source safer via scrutiny; scaling laws corrected by Chinchilla.
views.zh: 2023年强调数据质量优于算力扩张，开源通过审查更安全，缩放定律被Chinchilla修正。

views.en: Efficiency gains 100x over three years; data quality bottleneck; enterprise adoption underestimated long-term.
views.zh: 2024年指出三年内效率提升可达100倍，数据质量是瓶颈，企业采用长期被低估。

views.en: Pre-training saturation; commoditization shifts value to vertical specialization and enterprise customization.
views.zh: 2026年认为预训练趋于饱和，模型商品化使价值转向垂直专业化和企业定制。

views.en: AGI not a single system; real challenge is practical integration and organizational change.
views.zh: 2026年强调AGI不是单一系统，真正挑战是实际整合和组织变革。

views.en: Open source enables customization, control, and avoids vendor lock-in for enterprise AI.
views.zh: 始终主张开源让企业AI实现定制、控制并避免供应商锁定。

people.bioEn: Founder of xAI (Grok) and CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. A central and polarizing force in AI through xAI, Tesla's self-driving, and the Optimus robot, and an outspoken voice on AI risk.
people.bioZh: xAI(Grok)创始人,特斯拉与 SpaceX CEO。通过 xAI、特斯拉自动驾驶与 Optimus 机器人,他是 AI 领域核心而又极具争议的力量,也常就 AI 风险高调发声。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Data Centers Will Move to Space in 36 Months
Elon Musk on AI, robots, and the future
Optimus: The Greatest Product Ever?
Elon Musk on the Intelligence Big Bang and Building Useful Things
Elon Musk on War, Human Nature, and Peace in the Middle East

views.en: War is part of human nature, but intelligence can control violent instincts. AI safety needs regulatory oversight.
views.zh: 战争是人性的一部分，但智能可以控制暴力本能。AI安全需要监管监督。

views.en: Digital superintelligence may arrive this year or next. AI safety requires rigorous truth-seeking.
views.zh: 数字超级智能可能今年或明年到来。AI安全需要严格的求真。

views.en: Humanoid robots (Optimus) will be the greatest product ever, enabling recursive manufacturing and solving national debt.
views.zh: 人形机器人Optimus将是有史以来最伟大的产品，实现递归制造并解决国家债务。

views.en: AI compute scaling will hit a power wall on Earth; space-based data centers are the only scalable option within 36 months.
views.zh: AI算力扩展将在地球上遇到电力瓶颈；太空数据中心是36个月内唯一可扩展的方案。

views.en: Becoming a multiplanetary species is essential for civilization's long-term survival and AI safety.
views.zh: 成为多行星物种对文明的长期生存和AI安全至关重要。

people.bioEn: A co-author of "Attention Is All You Need" (the Transformer paper) and co-creator of TensorFlow's Tensor2Tensor. Now at OpenAI, working on reasoning models.
people.bioZh: Transformer 奠基论文《Attention Is All You Need》的共同作者,TensorFlow Tensor2Tensor 的共同创造者。现于 OpenAI 研究推理模型。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Progress Isn't Slowing Down

people.tiZh: CMU 教授 · OpenAI 董事
people.bioEn: A Carnegie Mellon professor and head of its machine learning department, and a member of OpenAI's board. Known for work on adversarial robustness and deep learning theory.
people.bioZh: 卡内基梅隆大学教授、机器学习系主任,OpenAI 董事会成员。以对抗鲁棒性与深度学习理论的研究著称。

episodes.tEn: AI Safety Oversight at OpenAI: A Conversation with Ziko Culture
AI Data Crisis: Myth or Reality?
Machine Learning Algorithms, Unsupervised Learning, and Probability

views.en: Framed ML as hypothesis class, loss, optimization; stressed proper evaluation to avoid overfitting.
views.zh: 2014年：将机器学习框架化为假设类、损失函数和优化方法；强调正确评估以避免过拟合。

views.en: Next-token prediction yields intelligence; data shortage is a myth; safety issues are specification failures.
views.zh: 2024年：下一个词预测产生智能；数据短缺是迷思；安全问题主要是规范失败。

views.en: Safety requires explicit training and defense layers; bigger models don't automatically become safer.
views.zh: 2026年：安全需要显式训练和防御层；更大的模型不会自动变得更安全。

people.bioEn: A researcher at Anthropic focused on scaling and reinforcement learning, and a prominent young voice on how far today's models can really go.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 研究员,专注于规模扩张与强化学习;关于「当前模型究竟能走多远」的代表性青年声音。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic's Super Bowl Ads: A Blue Shell Attack on OpenAI?
The AI Compute Super Cycle and the Making of Claude Sonnet 4.5
RL and Language Models: Progress, Agents, and Feedback Loops in 2025
Long Context: The Underhyped Key to Superhuman AI

views.en: Long context windows are underhyped; they solve onboarding and boost intelligence via in-context learning resembling gradient descent.
views.zh: 2024年认为长上下文被低估，能解决模型接入问题并通过类似梯度下降的上下文学习提升智能。

views.en: RL from verifiable rewards is key; models learn new capabilities via RL, not just eliciting pre-trained knowledge.
views.zh: 2025年强调基于可验证奖励的强化学习是关键突破，模型能通过强化学习获得新能力，而不仅仅是激发预训练知识。

views.en: Reinforcement learning is a new scaling axis alongside pre-training; simplest RL methods work best for language models.
views.zh: 2025至2026年认为强化学习是与预训练并列的新扩展轴，最简单的强化学习方法对语言模型最有效。

views.en: AI models have massive capability overhang; better tools and orchestration matter more than raw intelligence for now.
views.zh: 2026年指出AI模型存在巨大能力过剩，当前更好的工具和编排比原始智能更重要。

views.en: Coding is the most tractable domain for AI due to verifiability; transformers are sufficient for AGI without new architecture.
views.zh: 始终认为编程因可验证性成为AI最易处理的领域，Transformer足以实现AGI，无需新架构。

people.bioEn: A research scientist at the Allen Institute for AI (Ai2) working on RLHF and open models (OLMo), and author of the widely-read Interconnects newsletter.
people.bioZh: 艾伦人工智能研究所(Ai2)研究科学家,从事 RLHF 与开放模型(OLMo);广受关注的 Interconnects 通讯作者。

episodes.tEn: Inside China's AI Labs: Nathan Lambert on Open Models, Compute Constraints, and US-China Divergence
Open Models as the Engine for the Next Decade of AI Research
Post-Training Recipes and RLVR with Nathan Lambert
Tulu 3: Open Source Post-Training for LLMs
AI's Societal Impact and Openness in Model Development

views.en: RLHF remains dominant; fine-tuning can undo alignment with minimal compute, but disagreement among labelers is a signal.
views.zh: 2024年：RLHF仍为主流；微调可用极少算力破坏对齐，但标注者分歧是信号而非缺陷。

views.en: Post-training stages (SFT, DPO, RL) each add value; data quality matters 10x more than algorithm choice.
views.zh: 2024至2025年：后训练各阶段（SFT、DPO、RL）均有价值；数据质量比算法选择重要10倍。

views.en: RLVR overoptimization is a key challenge; hybrid reasoning models may be temporary, pure reasoning models could dominate.
views.zh: 2025年：RLVR过度优化是关键挑战；混合推理模型可能只是过渡，纯推理模型或占主导。

views.en: Open models will drive AI research for a decade, lagging 6-9 months behind closed ones; pre-training data is the hardest legal hurdle.
views.zh: 2026年：开放模型将驱动AI研究十年，落后闭源模型6-9个月；预训练数据是最难的法律障碍。

views.en: Open-source post-training can match frontier models with careful data curation; open models are crucial for sovereign AI and reducing power concentration.
views.zh: 始终：开源后训练通过精心数据策展可媲美前沿模型；开放模型对主权AI和权力分散至关重要。

people.tiZh: Scale AI 创始人 · Meta 超智能
people.bioEn: Founder and former CEO of Scale AI, which built much of the data infrastructure behind modern AI. In 2025 he joined Meta to lead its Superintelligence Labs.
people.bioZh: Scale AI 创始人兼前 CEO——它构建了现代 AI 背后的大量数据基础设施。2025 年加入 Meta,领导其超级智能实验室。

episodes.tEn: Alex Wang on Meta's AI Strategy and New Model Release
Alex Wang on Neuralink, AI, and the Future of Humanity
From Squiggle to Scale: Alex's Founder Journey
Alexander Wang on Data as the New Code and the Future of AI
Scale AI CEO Alexander Wang on Raising $100M at 22

views.en: Data is the key bottleneck for AI; AGI is far off; infinite compute alone won't produce general intelligence.
views.zh: 数据是AI的关键瓶颈；AGI还很遥远；仅靠无限算力无法产生通用智能。

views.en: Data is the new code, not oil; post-training data and human expertise are the limiting factors for scaling.
views.zh: 数据是新代码而非石油；后训练数据和人类专家是规模扩张的限制因素。

views.en: Post-training with specialized data is key; synthetic data works but is not a silver bullet; no US-China research gap.
views.zh: 用专门数据做后训练是关键；合成数据有效但不是万能药；美中研究无差距。

views.en: AI is centralizing; data is raw material like oil; humans must stay sovereign; brain-computer interfaces needed.
views.zh: AI是中心化技术；数据是像石油一样的原材料；人类必须保持主权；需要脑机接口。

views.en: Superintelligence is coming soon; scaling compute, data, and RL is key; model welfare matters; open-source must be safe.
views.zh: 超级智能即将到来；扩展算力、数据和强化学习是关键；模型福利重要；开源必须安全。

people.bioEn: Creator and lead of Claude Code, Anthropic's agentic command-line coding tool, and a central figure in the shift to AI-driven software engineering.
people.bioZh: Anthropic 智能体命令行编程工具 Claude Code 的创造者与负责人;AI 驱动软件工程浪潮中的核心人物。

episodes.tEn: AI Coding on Phone: Boris on 8B Tokens & ROI
Will AI Replace Software Engineers?
From Pokémon Cards to AI: The Claude Code Story
Claude Code: The End of Software Engineering as We Know It
Building for the Model 6 Months from Now: The Accidental Creation of Claude Code

views.en: Build for the model six months from now, not today's model; bet on more general models.
views.zh: 为六个月后的模型构建，而非今天的模型；押注更通用的模型。

views.en: Coding is virtually solved; software engineer title will fade, replaced by 'builder'.
views.zh: 编码已基本解决；软件工程师头衔将消失，被“构建者”取代。

views.en: Safety is studied by releasing early; internal evals aren't enough for real-world behavior.
views.zh: 安全通过早期发布来研究；内部评估不足以反映真实世界行为。

views.en: Latent demand is key: observe how users abuse your product to find the next feature.
views.zh: 潜在需求是关键：观察用户如何滥用你的产品来发现下一个功能。

views.en: ROI is the right framing for AI coding tools; use most capable model, focus on increasing returns.
views.zh: ROI是AI编码工具的正确框架；使用最强大的模型，专注于增加回报。

people.bioEn: A product manager on Claude Code at Anthropic, shaping how developers work with agentic coding tools and how the team ships so fast.
people.bioZh: Anthropic Claude Code 团队产品经理,塑造开发者与智能体编程工具协作的方式,以及团队的高速迭代。

episodes.tEn: The New PM Playbook for AI-Native Products
